price_manipulation.description: Price/amount parameter tampering — alter transaction values to pay less or gain unauthorized discounts
suggested_actions: Send negative price: POST /checkout with price=-100.00 to trigger credit instead of charge
Intercept payment POST and change amount=0.01 before server-side confirmation
Test price=0 and price=-1 on subscription/upgrade endpoints — some backends skip negative validation

quantity_manipulation.description: Quantity/inventory tampering — negative or overflow values to gain product without payment
suggested_actions: Send quantity=-1 in add-to-cart POST — may trigger refund credit without actual purchase
Integer overflow: quantity=9999999999 — wraps to 0 or negative if backend uses INT32
POST /order with qty=0 then confirm — check if order processes with zero-cost fulfillment

currency_manipulation.description: Currency parameter tampering — switch currency to exploit exchange rate discrepancy
suggested_actions: Change currency=USD to currency=IRR or currency=VND — check if price converts correctly at checkout
Send currency=INVALID or currency=XBT and observe fallback behavior or unhandled exception
Intercept payment confirmation and change currency code after server calculates price in original currency

coupon_abuse.description: Coupon/voucher abuse — reuse codes, stack discounts, or enumerate valid promo codes
suggested_actions: Race condition: send 50 simultaneous POST /redeem with same coupon_code — check if credit applied multiple times
Apply coupon then remove/re-add items — verify discount persists without re-validation
Enumerate: test SAVE10, SAVE20, PROMO2024, STAFF50, ADMIN100 — brute force sequential/patterned codes

privilege_escalation.description: Privilege escalation via business flow — elevate role/plan without proper authorization
suggested_actions: Add is_admin=true or role=admin to registration/profile-update POST body
Intercept subscription upgrade — change plan=basic to plan=enterprise before payment confirmation
Test PATCH /api/user with {"role":"admin","verified":true,"plan":"lifetime"} — mass assignment check

race_condition_transaction.description: Race condition in financial transactions — parallel requests exploit TOCTOU for double-spend
suggested_actions: Send 50 simultaneous POST /transfer with same idempotency key using asyncio/threading
Turbo Intruder gate technique: prepare 100 /redeem requests, release all simultaneously
Compare pre/post balance: if 50 requests processed, balance should change by 50x but check if only 1x

bypass_rate_limit.description: Rate limit bypass — evade throttling via IP rotation headers or distributed requests
suggested_actions: Rotate X-Forwarded-For: 1.2.3.X values — many rate limiters key on IP from this header
Try X-Real-IP, X-Originating-IP, X-Remote-Addr, CF-Connecting-IP with fresh IPs per request
Distribute via different User-Agent strings or add random noise headers to bypass keying logic

infinite_credits.description: Credit/points/wallet manipulation — negative values or race conditions to gain unlimited credits
suggested_actions: POST /transfer with negative amount: {"amount":-100} — may move credits from other accounts to yours
Race condition on credit-earning endpoint: trigger 50 simultaneous requests for same qualifying action
Integer overflow: credits=2147483648 — INT32 wraps to large negative value which may display as positive

subscription_bypass.description: Subscription/plan abuse — access premium features after downgrade, cancel, or expiry
suggested_actions: Upgrade to premium → downgrade to free → check if premium API endpoints/features remain accessible
Cancel subscription mid-cycle — test if server checks active status on each request or only at login
Manipulate subscription expiry date field in JWT/cookie if stored client-side — extend trial indefinitely

free_trial_abuse.description: Free trial account abuse — create unlimited trials without payment by cycling emails/accounts
suggested_actions: Create multiple accounts using email+alias trick: user+1@gmail.com, user+2@gmail.com — same inbox
Test if trial extends by changing plan back: free→trial→free repeatedly to reset timer
Check if trial flag is stored in user object — attempt to set trial_expires=9999999999 via mass assignment

referral_self_referral.description: Referral program abuse — self-referral to earn bonus or circular referral chains
suggested_actions: Register new account with your own referral code — check if server validates referred vs referrer
Circular referral: A refers B, B refers A — check if both earn bonus without any new actual user
Race: send 50 simultaneous referral completions with same code — check if each awards a bonus

workflow_step_skip.description: Multi-step workflow manipulation — skip mandatory steps, repeat steps, or reverse flow order
suggested_actions: Access step 3 URL directly without completing steps 1 and 2 — check server-side state enforcement
Complete checkout without visiting payment step — jump from /cart directly to /order/confirm
Skip email/KYC verification: intercept step-complete request and replay it with different step_id

inventory_hoarding.description: Inventory reservation abuse — reserve stock without payment to block competitors or cause DoS
suggested_actions: Add items to cart without checkout — test how long reservation persists and if released on timeout
Create 1000 carts with item reserved — check if actual inventory decrements causing out-of-stock
Race: simultaneous reserve requests for last 1 unit — check if both succeed (negative inventory)

price_locking_expired.description: Expired promotional price locking — checkout with old cached/manipulated price from expired promotion
suggested_actions: Add item to cart during sale → wait for sale to end → complete checkout — check if original price enforced
Intercept add-to-cart response with sale price → replay add-to-cart POST after sale ends
Modify price in cart session cookie or localStorage if stored client-side — submit checkout with old price

gift_card_manipulation.description: Gift card/voucher value manipulation — alter stored value or enumerate valid card numbers
suggested_actions: Enumerate gift card numbers: sequential or pattern-based (GC-2024-XXXX) — brute force valid codes
Check balance endpoint: GET /api/giftcard?code=GC123 — test IDOR to view other cards' balances
Race condition on redeem: send same gift card code 50x simultaneously — check if credited multiple times

multi_tenant_data_isolation.description: Multi-tenant SaaS — insufficient tenant isolation allows cross-tenant data access
suggested_actions: Change tenant_id or org_id in API requests to another organization's ID — test data isolation
Capture resource IDs from tenant A, access them from tenant B's authenticated session
Test /api/admin/tenants endpoint — common IDOR allows viewing all tenant data without authorization

account_enumeration.description: Account/username enumeration via differential response — timing, content, or status code differences
suggested_actions: Timing attack: measure response time for valid vs invalid username in login — significant diff = vulnerable
Password reset: 'Email sent' vs 'User not found' — different messages confirm account existence
Registration: 'Email already taken' on duplicate = enumerates valid accounts; check for timing too

shipping_address_fraud.description: Shipping/delivery address manipulation after payment — change delivery after charges applied
suggested_actions: Complete payment → immediately PUT /api/order/{id}/shipping with new address before fulfillment
Test if order address is checked at dispatch or only at checkout — window for IDOR address change
Intercept fulfillment notification and inject different address if order ID is predictable
